infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Site Snap uses your microphone for voice commands so you can log hours, daily notes, and project updates hands-free.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Site Snap uses your location to show current weather at your job site.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Site Snap uses your location to show current weather at your job site.

plugins.photosPermission: Site Snap uses your photo library to attach site photos to daily reports.
plugins.cameraPermission: Site Snap uses your camera to capture site photos for daily reports.
Site Snap uses your camera to record 3D site scan walkthroughs.
plugins.microphonePermission: Site Snap uses the microphone when recording site scan videos.
